front.title: Explicitly excluding objects from RPSL sets

abstract.t: This document updates [RFC2622] and [RFC4012] by defining the excl- members attribute on as-set and route-set classes in the Routing Policy Specification Language (RPSL). The existing RPSL syntax only supports the implicit inclusion of everything contained within an as- set or route-set. The newly defined attribute allows operators to overcome this limitation of the existing syntax by enabling them to explicitly exclude specific members from that implicit inclusion.
